title: ammannia fruticosa
intro: Ammannia fruticosa, also known as the African waterwort or water wort, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, malaria, and various skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Ammannia fruticosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional remedies as a paste or poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
